inputs.reasoning: Many alternations create many kInstAlt nodes, pushing many jobs onto the stack to trigger GrowStack and exercise alt switching logic
Nested captures with multiple alternations forces deep stack usage and kInstCapture + kInstAlt interleaving
Multiple greedy stars create kInstAltMatch opcodes, exercising the greedy branch of kInstAltMatch
Alternation of plus-quantified groups creates deep job stacks and exercises ShouldVisit checks
Non-capturing groups with alternation and stars exercises TrySearch main loop and AltMatch
Deeply nested alternations inside captures create a tall recursion tree stressing GrowStack
Counted repetitions expand to many alternations, exercising ByteRange matching paths
Large character class alternation with plus forces repeated stack growth and ShouldVisit
Non-capturing group with many inner alternations repeated with + maximizes job stack pressure
Many optional characters create many AltMatch instructions, exercising greedy/non-greedy paths
